mapper.select: SELECT id, device_name, capacity_kw, install_date, location, status, location_id, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM solar_devices WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO solar_devices ( device_name, capacity_kw, install_date, location, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{deviceName}, #{capacityKw}, #{installDate}, #{location}, 'ACTIVE', #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE solar_devices SET status = #{status}, updated_at =NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
